command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
JOB_ID='phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2'
RUN_ID='bg-20260623T210555Z-6099f8d1'
WS="memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/$RUN_ID"

sleep 10

echo '=RUN STATE='
cat "$WS/run-state.json" 2>/dev/null

echo '=LIVENESS HEARTBEAT='
cat "$WS/heartbeat-liveness.json" 2>/dev/null

echo '=PROGRESS HEARTBEAT='
cat "$WS/heartbeat-progress.json" 2>/dev/null

echo '=WORKER PID='
cat "$WS/worker-pid.json" 2>/dev/null

echo '=PID ALIVE='
PID=73909
kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null && echo PID_ALIVE || echo PID_DEAD

echo '=WORKER LOG HEAD='
head -30 "$WS/worker.log" 2>/dev/null

echo '=LEDGER='
head -5 "$WS/event-ledger.ndjson" 2>/dev/null
ENDSSH
